seed_expert_discoveries.project: Codex agent memory and goal management
seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Create a goal.md file for ramblings; use set_goal tool with user approval before setting; leverage compactions so Codex references the goal.md persistently across interactions.

seed_expert_discoveries.project: Codex skill creation from user artifacts
seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Provide samples of preferred writings and artifacts to Codex to convert into reusable skills; add the skill to agents.md for consistent, high-quality output in agent workflows.

global_discoveries.project: Mnemosyne memory layer for AI agents
global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Zero-dependency SQLite-based memory with BEAM (Bilevel Episodic-Associative Memory) tiers: working memory auto-injected pre-LLM, episodic with hybrid vector/keyword search and 32x compression via binarization; 98.9% recall on LongMemEval, works with Hermes/Codex/Claude via MCP or pip install; supports knowledge graphs and lifecycle hooks.

global_discoveries.project: AgentKeys memory gate and OpenViking integration
global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: AgentKeys acts as authority layer/gate for agent memory access control; integrates pluggable ranking engines like OpenViking; separates memory retrieval from policy enforcement for scalable multi-agent persistent memory.
New more capable and compute-efficient memory architecture with summary page for users to review/steer stored memories; improves long-term recall in conversational agents.
